note: GW38 is the final gameweek of the 2025/26 season. No multi-GW fixture window exists beyond this point. Fixture run rankings are derived from GW38 FDR values only (single gameweek). Home/away weighting cannot be applied as per-fixture home/away data is not present in cache; raw FDR is used as proxy.

best_runs.note: FDR 1 — easiest fixture in the gameweek
FDR 2 — second easiest; Bowen and Mavropanos assets benefit
FDR 3 — mid-range; Gabriel, Rice, Saka all playable
FDR 3 — Anderson, Gibbs-White highest xPts in the pool
FDR 3 — Truffert and Senesi strong DEF options
FDR 3 — E.Le Fée top-10 xPts overall

worst_runs.note: FDR 5 — hardest fixture; Watkins, Rogers, Martinez, Cash all face a very tough match
FDR 4 — B.Fernandes, Casemiro, Mbeumo, Cunha, Dalot, Sesko all in a difficult fixture
FDR 4 — Thiago, Kelleher, Lewis-Potter, Collins, Kayode all face tough opposition
FDR 4 — Canvot (squad player), Muñoz, Lacroix, Mitchell, Richards, Mateta all in hard game

data_quality_note: No DGW/BGW flags detected in cache data. GW38 is the season finale — all teams play exactly one match. No blank or double gameweeks apply. Multi-GW fixture run analysis (next-5 window) is not applicable as no future gameweeks exist in the dataset.
